ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Model placed king rasko grey at position 2 (16.0% probability) vs top pick No Drama This End (22.0%). Underestimated winning horse by ~6.0 percentage points.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was No Drama This End > King Rasko Grey, but actual result was King Rasko Grey > Act Of Innocence. Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Winner King Rasko Grey had well-aligned model/market values (divergence -2.7%). Market pricing efficient for this outcome.
